vocab.meaning: viết lại, ghi lại cái gì đó nhanh chóng
vocab.example: I prefer typing during lectures because it allows me to get down every single point the professor mentions.
I still like to jot down my creative ideas in a notebook before I start typing them up on my laptop.

vocab.meaning: đánh máy lại bản thảo (thường là từ bản viết tay)
vocab.example: Once I've finished my initial brainstorming on paper, I usually type up the final version for work.
When I'm in a rush, I often scribble down phone numbers on whatever scrap of paper I can find.

vocab.meaning: làm hỏng, làm sai (trong ngữ cảnh này là viết sai)
vocab.example: The great thing about typing is that if you mess up, you can simply hit backspace instead of using an eraser.
My handwriting is far too slow to keep up with my train of thought, so I find typing much more efficient.

vocab.meaning: gạch bỏ (phần văn bản viết sai)
vocab.example: I dislike handwriting because I hate having to cross out words, which makes the whole page look untidy.

vocab.meaning: dựa dẫm vào, phụ thuộc vào
vocab.example: Most people in my generation rely on digital devices for writing, making pen and paper almost obsolete.

vocab.meaning: phải dùng đến phương án dự phòng (khi phương án chính thất bại)
vocab.example: If my laptop battery dies, I have to fall back on the old-fashioned method of using a pen.
I usually type my essays and then print them out to proofread them more effectively.
